questions.text: What does 'Fatir' mean?
questions.answer: The Originator or The Creator.

questions.text: How does Allah describe the wings of angels in the first verse?
questions.answer: They have wings in pairs of two, three, and four; He increases in creation what He wills.

questions.text: What happens when Allah opens His mercy for people?
questions.answer: None can withhold it; and whatever He withholds, none can release after Him.

questions.text: What is the warning regarding Satan in Verse 6?
questions.answer: Indeed, Satan is an enemy to you; so take him as an enemy.

questions.text: To whom does all 'Honor' (Izzah) belong?
questions.answer: To Allah entirely.

questions.text: What rises up to Allah and what raises it?
questions.answer: To Him ascends the 'Good Word' (al-kalim al-tayyib), and righteous work raises it.

questions.text: Are the two seas equal (Verse 12)?
questions.answer: No; one is fresh, sweet, and pleasant to drink, and the other is salty and bitter. Yet from both you eat fresh meat and extract ornaments to wear.

questions.text: What is the 'Qitmir' mentioned in Verse 13?
questions.answer: The thin membrane over a date-stone; those called upon besides Allah do not possess even that much.

questions.text: How does Allah describe the human need for Him?
questions.answer: O mankind, you are those in need (Fuqara) of Allah, while Allah is the Free of need (Al-Ghani), the Praiseworthy.

questions.text: Can a bearer of burdens (sins) carry the burden of another?
questions.answer: No, no bearer of burdens will bear the burden of another.

questions.text: What are the four opposites mentioned that are not equal in Verses 19-22?
questions.answer: The blind and the seeing, the darknesses and the light, the shade and the heat, and the living and the dead.

questions.text: Is there any nation that has not been sent a warner?
questions.answer: No; 'And there was no nation but that there had passed within it a warner'.

questions.text: What are the diverse colors mentioned regarding nature (Verse 27)?
questions.answer: Mountains have tracts of white and red of varying shades and [some] extremely black, just as humans, moving creatures, and livestock are of various colors.

questions.text: Who among the servants of Allah truly fear Him?
questions.answer: Those of knowledge (the Ulama).

questions.text: What are the three categories of people who inherit the Book (Verse 32)?
questions.answer: The 'wrongdoer to himself', the 'moderate', and the 'foremost in good deeds' by Allah's permission.

questions.text: What will the inhabitants of Paradise say about their sorrow?
questions.answer: 'Praise to Allah, who has removed from us [all] sorrow. Indeed, our Lord is Forgiving and Appreciative'.

questions.text: What will be the cry of the disbelievers in Hell (Verse 37)?
questions.answer: They will cry 'Our Lord, remove us; we will do righteousness other than what we were doing!'.

questions.text: What is the 'greatest' thing according to Verse 45?
questions.answer: The remembrance of Allah (Dhikirullah).

questions.text: What would happen if Allah were to punish people for what they earned immediately?
questions.answer: He would not leave a single moving creature on the surface of the earth.

questions.text: How does the Surah describe the 'Sunnah of Allah' (way/law of Allah)?
questions.answer: You will never find in the Way of Allah any change, nor will you find in the Way of Allah any alteration.
